items.name: button
items.title: Button
items.description: Accessible, theme-driven button mirroring shadcn/ui v4. 6 variants, 8 sizes, hover/focus-visible (web), tactile scale on native, loading + disabled states, asChild via Slot.

items.name: dialog
items.title: Dialog
items.description: Modal dialog mirroring shadcn/ui v4. Thin Unistyles wrapper over @rn-primitives/dialog (Radix on web → focus trap + scroll lock + ESC; native → BackHandler + accessibilityViewIsModal). Reanimated v3 fade + zoom open/close. Built-in close button using @expo/vector-icons Feather X. 10 exports: Dialog, DialogTrigger, DialogPortal, DialogOverlay, DialogContent, DialogClose, DialogHeader, DialogFooter, DialogTitle, DialogDescription. Consumer must mount <PortalHost /> from @rn-primitives/portal once high in the app tree.

items.name: tokens
items.title: Tokens
items.description: Semantic tokens with the shadcn-default palette + Unistyles theme configuration.
